title: DANCOLOR Small Sports Car Toys With Openable Doors, Pull Back Toy Cars For 3 4 5 6 Years Old Boys Girls, Kids Toys For Birthday Gifts Christmas Party Bag Fillers, 1:43 Scale Race Cars Model
features: 【Premium Material & Craftsmanship】Made of durable zinc alloy and high-quality plastic, this 1:43 scale model features a smooth pull back function and realistic 3-opening doors (trunk and car’s door) for enhanced playability.
【Exquisite Detail & Authenticity】Highly detailed interior, exterior, and wheels; inspired by classic sports cars, perfect for collectors or as a display piece.

【Perfect Gift for All Ages】Safe for kids aged 3+ (small parts excluded), ideal for birthdays, holidays, Christmas, or as a collectible race car gift for adults. Includes a sleek gift box (12.2x7.2x5.5cm) for easy storage and gifting
【Two Vibrant Choice】Choose between elegant white or striking purple—each model combines retro design with modern durability for long-lasting enjoyment.
【Ideal for Play & Display】Compact size (10.5x4.8x2.6cm) fits shelves or playrooms; compatible with other 1:43 scale diecast models for immersive racing scenes
